note: SSA page uses JavaScript charts — text extraction only. No machine-readable tables available.
context: SSA claims improved performance under DOGE - wait times DOWN from 20 to 7 min on 800 number. BUT: SSA also closed field offices and cut ~7,000 staff, which will likely increase wait times for in-person and complex claims. Disability determination processing times are chart-based (no text values available).
doge_impact_note: SSA lost ~7,000 employees in early 2025 under DOGE. 47 field offices closed. Long-term wait time impacts expected but not yet fully reflected in available data.
